name: Qi Alfred Chen

work.note: The official UC Irvine-hosted CV identifies him as UC Irvine faculty.

tracking.note: Official UC Irvine-hosted CV provides explicit undergraduate, Ph.D., and advisor history.

sources.note: Ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a current affiliation, but no lineage details.

The official UC Irvine-hosted CV lists a B.S. from Nanjing University and a Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering from the University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, naming Z. Morley Mao as dissertation chair.

summary: The official UC Irvine-hosted CV lists Qi Alfred Chen's B.S. from Nanjing University and Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering from the University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, naming Z. Morley Mao as dissertation chair.

undergraduate.note: The official UC Irvine-hosted CV lists `B.S. in Department of Computer Science and Technology, Nanjing University, Nanjing, China, 2012`.

masters.note: The reviewed official UC Irvine-hosted CV does not mention a master's degree.

phd.status: Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering
phd.note: The official UC Irvine-hosted CV lists `Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering, University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, 2018` and names Prof. Z. Morley Mao as dissertation chair.

postdoc.note: The reviewed official UC Irvine-hosted CV does not state postdoctoral training.

name: Qiang Liu

work.note: His homepage, the HexHive page, and the ranking page all place him at EPFL.

tracking.note: Imported as a recursively expanded subject from the requested homepage.

sources.note: The homepage biography says he is a postdoc at EPFL working with Prof. Mathias Payer and that he earned his Ph.D. from Zhejiang University under the guidance of Prof. Yajin Zhou.
The HexHive members page lists Qiang Liu as a postdoc and also as a visiting Ph.D. student from Zhejiang University in fall 2021 and spring 2022.

summary: Currently a postdoc at EPFL HexHive with Mathias Payer. He earned his Ph.D. from Zhejiang University in 2023 under Yajin Zhou.

masters.note: The current official homepage does not explicitly provide a master's institution.

phd.note: The homepage says he earned his Ph.D. in 2023 from Zhejiang University under the guidance of Prof. Yajin Zhou.

postdoc.note: The homepage says he is a postdoc at EPFL working with Prof. Mathias Payer, and the HexHive page corroborates him as a postdoc.
